a:T17cc,<div class="question">
<p>A stone is kicked horizontally at a speed of 1.5 m s<sup>−1</sup> from the edge of a cliff on one of Jupiter’s moons. It hits the ground 2.0 s later. The height of the cliff is 4.0 m. Air resistance is negligible.</p>
<p>What is the magnitude of the displacement of the stone?</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;"/></p>
<p>A.  7.0 m</p>
<p>B.  5.0 m</p>
<p>C.  4.0 m</p>
<p>D.  3.0 m</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/2/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","2"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.SL.TZ1.5"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","2-1-motion"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>B</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>This question was generally well answered by both HL and SL candidates and had a mid-range difficulty index (indicating an easier question).
